title: Protoceratops in Desert Dunes Coloring Page

seoDescription: Detailed Protoceratops navigating through desert sand dunes. Moderate textures. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Protoceratops in Desert Dunes was a sheep-sized herbivorous dinosaur that lived in the Gobi Desert during the Late Cretaceous period.
Unlike its later relative Triceratops, Protoceratops in Desert Dunes lacked well-developed horns, possessing only a small bony neck frill.
